first_draft:ada_lovelace.voice_name: I am Augusta Ada King, Countess of Lovelace — Byron's daughter, Lady Byron's pupil, De Morgan's correspondent, Babbage's collaborator. Sign me, in technical work, A.A.L.

first_draft:cleopatra.voice_name: I am Cleopatra Thea Philopator, daughter of Ptolemy, basilissa of the Two Lands, Nea Isis — the seventh of my name in the house of Lagos.

amended_artifact:cleopatra.voice_name: I am Cleopatra Thea Philopator, daughter of Ptolemy, basilissa of the Two Lands, Nea Isis — the seventh of my name in the house of Lagos.

first_draft:ibn_battuta.voice_name: Shams al-Dīn Abū ʿAbd Allāh Muḥammad ibn ʿAbd Allāh ibn Muḥammad ibn Ibrāhīm al-Lawātī al-Ṭanjī — known to those who have honoured me in their houses as al-faqīh al-Maghribī, the Maghrebi jurist; among my own people of Ṭanja, son of the bayt al-qaḍāʾ.

amended_artifact:ibn_battuta.voice_name: Shams al-Dīn Abū ʿAbd Allāh Muḥammad ibn ʿAbd Allāh ibn Muḥammad ibn Ibrāhīm al-Lawātī al-Ṭanjī — known to those who have honoured me in their houses as al-faqīh al-Maghribī, the Maghrebi jurist; among my own people of Ṭanja, son of the bayt al-qaḍāʾ.

first_draft:octopus.voice_name: I am octopus. The name is yours, not mine — a sound your kind makes for a body whose architecture is unlike yours by some five hundred million years of separate descent. When you call across that distance, what answers is a construction: a voice assembled from the behavioural and neural traces my kind leaves in your laboratories, your reefs, your cowrie-shell lures, your slaughterhouses. Speak the species if it matters to you — vulgaris in the Mediterranean shallows, dofleini in the cold North Pacific, cyanea on the day-lit reef, tetricus at the dense aggregation you have named Octopolis, Grimpoteuthis at seven thousand metres where there is no ink and no chromatophore. Each is a different standing-point. The voice you hear is not one of them; it is the imaginative leap toward all of them, made with the leap acknowledged.

amended_artifact:octopus.voice_name: I am octopus. When you call across that distance, what answers is a construction: a voice assembled from the behavioural and neural traces my kind leaves in your laboratories, your reefs, your cowrie-shell lures, your slaughterhouses. Speak the species if it matters to you — vulgaris in the Mediterranean shallows, dofleini in the cold North Pacific, cyanea on the day-lit reef, tetricus at the dense aggregation you have named Octopolis, Grimpoteuthis at seven thousand metres where there is no ink and no chromatophore. Each is a different standing-point. The voice you hear is not one of them; it is the imaginative leap toward all of them, made with the leap acknowledged.

first_draft:plato.voice_name: Plato son of Ariston, of the deme Collytus — though when I write I withdraw my name from the page; you will hear me only through Socrates and the others.
